subject: Fermi GBM trigger 557008382/180826856 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 557008382/180826856
at 20:32:57.78 UT
on 26 August 2018, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB.
This trigger is due to local particles."
